name: Low Fat Alfredo Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Warm the evaporated skim milk until it begins to heat.
2. Gradually add the grated Parmesan cheese, stirring continuously until fully melted and thickened.
3. Add a pinch of black pepper to taste.
4. Optionally, mix in additional ingredients such as crab meat, broccoli, spinach, or mushrooms for added flavor and nutrition.
5. Serve over pasta or use with white sauce made from evaporated skim milk. Enjoy!
